{{CargoRelic
|name=Judgment Knight - Belt
|class_id=20399
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=When research on the dimension of time reaches its peak, one can transcend time and deliver equal judgment upon all beings! Someone has sealed the authority of time within a belt, granting its wearer the ability to toy with others' time. Simply by pressing a button, you can halt the flow of time, just like pausing a game!
|fame=14
|art=16
|fth=20
|civ=10
|tech=30
|ss1=Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail ATK +3<br>Time Machine LVL: 90/90
|ss2=Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail ATK +6<br>Time Machine LVL: 90/90
|ss3=Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail ATK +9<br>Time Machine LVL: 90/90
|ss4=Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail ATK +9<br>Time Machine LVL: 90/90
|ss7=Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail ATK +9<br>Time Machine LVL: 90/90<br> (Awakened)
}}
